56→ assert result.warnings == () 59→def test_prepare_plan_missing_title_prefix_returns_failure() -> None: 60→ """Plan without [erk-pr] title prefix returns PlanValidationFailed.""" 66→ assert isinstance(result, PlanValidationFailed) 70→def test_prepare_plan_non_open_generates_warning() -> None: 71→ """Non-OPEN plan generates warning in result.""" 82→ assert len(result.warnings) == 1 83→ assert "is CLOSED" in result.warnings[0] 84→ assert "Proceeding anyway" in result.warnings[0] 102→def test_prepare_plan_invalid_identifier_returns_failure() -> None: 103→ """Non-numeric plan identifier returns PlanValidationFailed.""" 109→ assert isinstance(result, PlanValidationFailed) 165→def test_missing_branch_returns_failure() -> None: 166→ """Plan without branch_name in header_fields returns failure.""" 176→ assert isinstance(result, PlanValidationFailed) 180→def test_empty_branch_returns_failure() -> None: 181→ """Plan with empty branch_name in header_fields returns failure.""" 191→ assert isinstance(result, PlanValidationFailed)
